Awards.body:
Academy Awards – Oscars 2025
1. Anora - Best Director - Sean Baker, Best Actress - Mikey Madison
2. The Brutalist - Best Actor - Adrien Brody
3. Emilia Pérez - Best Original Song - El Mal

56th International Film Festival of India (IFFI) 2025
❑ Best Feature Film : Skin of Youth – Directed by Ashleigh Mayfair
❑ Best Director : Santosh Davakhar (Gondhal)
❑ Best Actor : Ubeimar Rios (A Poet)
❑ Best Actress : Jara Sofija Ostan (Little Trouble Girls)
Miss Universe India, 2025 - Manika Vishwakarma (Rajasthan)
Miss World, 2025 - Opal Suchata Chuangsi (Thailand)
Mrs World 2025 - Tshego Gaelae (South Africa)

Nobel Prize 2025
Literature : László Krasznahorkai (Hungary)
Economy : Joel Mokyr (American and Israeli), Philippe Aghion (French), Peter Howitt (Canada)
Physics : John Clarke (British), Michel H. Devoret (French), John M. Martinis (American)
Physiology or Medicine : Mary E. Brunkow (USA), Fred Ramsdell (USA), Shimon Sakaguchi (Japan)

Vinod Kumar Shukla - 59th Jnanpith Award (2024)
Got Sahitya Akademi Award in 1999
His major novels include ‘Naukar Ki Kameez’, ‘Deewar Mein Ek Khidki Rahti Thi’ and ‘Khilega To Dekhenge’

Capital: A Portrait of Twenty-First Century Delhi authored by Rana Dagupta
Won 2025 Windham Campbell Prize in the ‘non-fiction category’ by (USA)-based Yale University.
Dr. Jayashree Vencatesan Becomes 1st Indian to Receive ‘Ramsar Award’ for Wetland Conservation

2025 Pritzker Architecture Prize Laureate - Chinese architect Liu Jiakun
Dragon Belt award - Japan
Japanese mathematician Masaki Kashiwara awarded the 2025 Abel Prize (For his - D-modules and discovery of crystal bases.)
Sudarshan Pattnaik, Odisha - 1st Indian to get Fred Darrington Sand Master Award.
Breakthrough Prize 2025 (Oscars® of Science) in Fundamental Physics - gets University of Jammu

International Booker Prize 2025
1st Muslim woman from India, Banu Mushtaq for her ‘Heart Lamp: Selected Stories’
Opal Suchata Chuangsri from Thailand was crowned Miss World 2025
PEN Pinter Prize 2025 - Leila Aboulela

Once Elephants Lived Here by Geetanjali Shree and translated by Daisy Rockwell.
Daisy Rockwell got PEN Translates Award 2025 for this.
German researcher Gerd Faltings the Abel Prize in 2026
Major Swathi Shantha Kumar was awarded the UN Secretary-General’s Award 2025 for promoting gender-inclusive peacekeeping.
Indira Gandhi Prize for Peace, Disarmament and Development for 2025 awarded to Graca Machel.
James Anderson Knighted for Services to Cricket
Global Humanitarian Award for Animal Welfare : Anant Ambani

Sahitya Akademi Award 2025
ENG : Winner – Navtej Sarna (For Novel – Crimson Spring)
Hindi : Mamta Kalia → For Jeete Jee Allahabad

59th Jnanpith Award (2024) — Vinod Kumar Shukla
60th Jnanpith Award (2025) -- R. Vairamuthu (Renowned Tamil Poet & Lyricist)
Kumar Mangalam Birla → Honoured With the Lata Deenanath Mangeshkar Award 2025.
Jayshree Vencatesan : First Indian To Win The Ramsar Award For Wetland Wise Use.
Dadasaheb Phalke Award 2025 • Given To : Mohanlal (Malayalam Actor)
Saraswati Samman 2024 - Winner : Bhadreshdas Swami (Sanskrit Scholar) → For ‘Swaminarayana Siddhanta Sudha’

70th Filmfare Awards 2025
• Best Film → Laapataa Ladies
• Best Director → Kiran Rao (Laapataa Ladies)
• Best Actor (Male) : Kartik Aaryan (Chandu Champion) & Abhishek Bachchan (I Want to Talk)
• Best Actress : Alia Bhatt (Jigra)

Pen Pinter Prize 2025
Winner : Leila Aboulela – Sudanese-Scottish Author

International Booker Prize 2025
Winner : Banu Mushtaq (Heart Lamp - Kannada) and Deepa Bhasthi (Translated into English)

Booker Prize 2025
Winner : Hungarian-British author David Szalay for novel “Flash” (in fiction)
Rajasthan’s Manika Vishwakarma Crowned Miss Universe India 2025
Fátima Bosch Fernández from Mexico was crowned Miss Universe 2025

Venice Film Festival
Best Film Director : Anuparna Roy (1st Indian Woman)
2025 Nobel Peace Prize was awarded to Maria Corina Machado, a Venezuelan opposition leader

Indian-origin historian Sunil Amrith wins British Academy Book Prize
"The Burning Earth: An Environmental History of the Last 500 Years"
Narendra Modi : Order of Oman First Class and Ethiopia’s Great Honor Nishan
Donald Trump awarded FIFA Peace Prize during 2026 World Cup draw in Washington.
Raveena Tandon named PETA India Person of the Year 2025.
Supriya Sahu - Champions of the Earth Award 2025.
International Film Festival of India (IFFI) in Goa; Rajinikanth received Satyajit Ray Lifetime Achievement Award.
Dadasaheb Phalke Award 2023 awarded to Malayalam superstar Mohanlal.
National Film Awards : Best Actor - Shah Rukh Khan (Jawan), Vikrant Massey (12th Fail); Best Actress - Rani Mukerji (Mrs. Chatterjee vs Norway).
Abel Prize 2025 (Maths Nobel equivalent): Masaki Kashiwara (Japan).

1. 2025 Miss World - Suchata Chuangsri, Thailand
2. 2025 Miss Universe - Fatima Bosch, Mexico
2025 Miss Universe India - Manika Biswakarma, Rajasthan
1st Indian Miss Universe - Susmita Sen
